mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS id, c.source AS source, c.business_type As businessType, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.products_name AS productsName, c.company_name AS companyName, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.warehouse_number AS warehouseNumber, c.bond_amount AS bondAmount, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.dealed_amount AS dealedAmount, c.billed_amount AS billedAmount, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTime, c.pay_bond_time AS payBondTime, c.contract_time AS contractTime, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.dept_id AS deptId, c.delivery_mode As deliveryMode, c.our_company_name As ourCompanyName, f.`status` As replyStatus FROM t_ctr_contract c LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_follow f ON c.id = f.ctr_contract_id WHERE IF ( 'invoice' = #{searchType}, c.dealed_amount > c.billed_amount AND date_add(CURDATE(),interval 2 day) > c.pay_full_time, (IF (c.dealed_amount >= c.bond_amount, c.total_amount > c.dealed_amount AND CURDATE() >= c.pay_full_time, c.bond_amount > c.dealed_amount AND CURDATE() >= c.pay_bond_time) ) ) AND c.contract_type = #{contractType} AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY c.id DESC
ORDER BY c.id DESC
ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT SUM(c.total_number) As totalNumber, SUM(c.warehouse_number) As warehouseNumber, SUM(c.bond_amount) As bondAmount, SUM(c.total_amount) As totalAmount, SUM(c.dealed_amount) As dealedAmount, SUM(c.billed_amount) As billedAmount, SUM(IF(c.pay_full_time > CURDATE(),c.bond_amount,c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount)) As orverdurAmount FROM t_ctr_contract c WHERE IF ( 'invoice' = #{searchType}, c.total_amount > c.billed_amount AND date_add(CURDATE(),interval 2 day) > c.pay_full_time, (IF (c.dealed_amount >= c.bond_amount, c.total_amount > c.dealed_amount AND CURDATE() > c.pay_full_time, c.bond_amount > c.dealed_amount AND CURDATE() > c.pay_bond_time) ) ) AND c.contract_type = #{contractType} AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}

SELECT c.id AS id, c.source AS source, c.business_type As businessType, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.products_name AS productsName, c.company_name AS companyName, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.warehouse_number AS warehouseNumber, c.bond_amount AS bondAmount, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.dealed_amount AS dealedAmount, c.billed_amount AS billedAmount, IF(c.pay_full_time > CURDATE(), c.bond_amount,c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount) As orverdurAmount, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTime, c.pay_bond_time AS payBondTime, c.contract_time AS contractTime, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.dept_id AS deptId FROM t_ctr_contract c WHERE IF ( c.dealed_amount >= c.bond_amount, c.total_amount > c.dealed_amount AND CURDATE() > c.pay_full_time, c.bond_amount > c.dealed_amount AND CURDATE() > c.pay_bond_time )
AND c.orverdur_flg IS NULL AND c.contract_status != 'C' AND c.company_id != '' ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT c.id AS id, c.source AS source, c.business_type As businessType, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.products_name AS productsName, c.company_name AS companyName, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.warehouse_number AS warehouseNumber, c.bond_amount AS bondAmount, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.dealed_amount AS dealedAmount, c.billed_amount AS billedAmount, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTime, c.pay_bond_time AS payBondTime, c.contract_time AS contractTime, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.dept_id AS deptId, c.delivery_mode As deliveryMode, c.our_company_name As ourCompanyName, c.total_amount - c.dealed_amount As orverdurAmount, f.`status` As replyStatus FROM t_ctr_contract c LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_follow f ON c.id = f.ctr_contract_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND date(now()) > c.pay_full_time AND c.total_amount > c.dealed_amount AND c.contract_type = #{contractType} AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY c.id DESC
ORDER BY c.id DESC
ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT SUM(c.total_number) As totalNumber, SUM(c.warehouse_number) As warehouseNumber, SUM(c.bond_amount) As bondAmount, SUM(c.total_amount) As totalAmount, SUM(c.dealed_amount) As dealedAmount, SUM(c.billed_amount) As billedAmount, SUM(IF(c.pay_full_time > CURDATE(),c.bond_amount,c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount)) As orverdurAmount FROM t_ctr_contract c WHERE 1 = 1
AND date(now()) > c.pay_full_time AND c.total_amount > c.dealed_amount AND c.contract_type = #{contractType} AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
